programme.title: Behind Bars: Officer Cam
programme.desc: Inside two of America's most pressurized jails, the cameras are always rolling; in Clayton County, Georgia, crumbling infrastructure, limited shower access and shrinking free time have pushed inmates to a breaking point; tensions boil over into confrontations; officers are attacked. Inmates fashion weapons; what begins as frustration over living conditions escalates into every jail administrator's

programme.title: Behind Bars: Officer Cam
programme.desc: In Clayton County Jail, an inmate attacks another in handcuffs in one of the facility's most alarming acts of violence. Elsewhere, what looks like a fight reveals a far more complicated story once investigators piece together the full picture. And with contraband still flowing, Chief Green leads a sweeping shakedown that uncovers exactly how much is hiding in plain sight. Amid the chaos, officers
